details.description: Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Abacavir. Manufacturer makes no recommendation.
Carbamazepine is predicted to markedly decrease the exposure to Abemaciclib. Manufacturer advises avoid.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Acalabrutinib. Manufacturer advises avoid.
Both Carbamazepine and Aceclofenac can increase the risk of hyponatraemia.
Carbamazepine decreases the effects of Acenocoumarol. Manufacturer advises monitor and adjust dose.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Afatinib. Manufacturer advises caution.
Carbamazepine decreases the concentration of Albendazole. Manufacturer makes no recommendation.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the effects of Alfacalcidol. Manufacturer makes no recommendation.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Alfentanil. Manufacturer makes no recommendation.
Carbamazepine decreases the exposure to Aliskiren. Manufacturer makes no recommendation.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Alpelisib. Manufacturer advises avoid.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Alprazolam. Manufacturer advises adjust dose.
Both Carbamazepine and Amisulpride can increase the risk of hyponatraemia.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Amlodipine. Manufacturer advises monitor and adjust dose.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Apixaban. Manufacturer advises use with caution or avoid.
Carbamazepine moderately decreases the exposure to Apremilast. Manufacturer advises avoid.
Carbamazepine is predicted to markedly decrease the exposure to Aprepitant. Manufacturer advises avoid.
Carbamazepine is predicted to moderately decrease the exposure to Aripiprazole. Manufacturer advises adjust Aripiprazole dose.
Both Carbamazepine and Aripiprazole can increase the risk of hyponatraemia.
Both Carbamazepine and Asenapine can increase the risk of hyponatraemia.
Atazanavir is predicted to increase the exposure to Carbamazepine and Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Atazanavir. Manufacturer advises monitor and adjust dose.

Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Edoxaban. Manufacturer advises caution.
Carbamazepine slightly decreases the exposure to Efavirenz and Efavirenz slightly decreases the exposure to Carbamazepine. Manufacturer advises caution and monitor Carbamazepine concentration.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Elacestrant. Manufacturer advises avoid or adjust dose depending on duration—consult product literature.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Eliglustat. Manufacturer advises avoid.

Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Eszopiclone. Manufacturer advises adjust dose.

Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the efficacy of Fluconazole and Fluconazole increases the concentration of Carbamazepine. Manufacturer advises avoid or monitor Carbamazepine concentration and adjust dose accordingly.

Both Carbamazepine and Flurbiprofen can increase the risk of hyponatraemia.

Isoniazid markedly increases the concentration of Carbamazepine and Carbamazepine increases the risk of hepatotoxicity when given with Isoniazid. Manufacturer advises monitor concentration and adjust dose.

Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Lacidipine. Manufacturer advises monitor and adjust dose.

Lamotrigine potentially increases the concentration of Carbamazepine and Carbamazepine decreases the concentration of Lamotrigine. Manufacturer advises adjust Lamotrigine dose and monitor Carbamazepine concentration.

Both Carbamazepine and Trimipramine can increase the risk of hyponatraemia.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Tucatinib. Manufacturer advises avoid.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Upadacitinib. Manufacturer advises monitor efficacy.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Vandetanib. Manufacturer advises avoid.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Vardenafil. Manufacturer makes no recommendation.
Carbamazepine might enhance the antidiuretic effect of Vasopressin. Manufacturer makes no recommendation.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Vemurafenib. Manufacturer advises avoid.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Venetoclax. Manufacturer advises avoid.
Both Carbamazepine and Venlafaxine can increase the risk of hyponatraemia.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Vinorelbine. Manufacturer advises use with caution or avoid.
Both Carbamazepine and Vinorelbine can increase the risk of hyponatraemia.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Vismodegib. Manufacturer advises avoid.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Voclosporin. Manufacturer advises avoid.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the efficacy of Voriconazole and Voriconazole increases the concentration of Carbamazepine. Manufacturer advises avoid or adjust dose.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Vortioxetine. Manufacturer advises monitor and adjust dose.
Both Carbamazepine and Xipamide can increase the risk of hyponatraemia.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Zanubrutinib. Manufacturer advises avoid.
Carbamazepine slightly to moderately decreases the concentration of Zonisamide and Zonisamide affects the concentration of Carbamazepine. Manufacturer advises monitor and adjust dose.
Carbamazepine is predicted to decrease the exposure to Zopiclone. Manufacturer advises adjust dose.
